content:
I was tired of Googling "how to fix d3dx9_43.dll" for 2 hours just to play GTA San Andreas for 10 minutes.

So I built a CLI you can just talk to.

Meet HridayaOS

HridayaOS is a command line assistant that understands plain English.

No more remembering rm -rf or digging through sketchy DLL sites.

Just type what you want it to do.

1. Fix Game Errors in 1 Line

bash
fix error d3d9_43.dll

Enter fullscreen mode

Exit fullscreen mode
